title: 'No one wants to miss the AI bus': India Inc resets strategy as AI takes over boardroom
description: Indian company boardrooms are now prioritizing artificial intelligence adoption. Leaders are discussing strategies to integrate AI for improved efficiency and a competitive advantage. This shift is evident across various sectors, including manufacturing and digital-native industries. Companies are seeking clear roadmaps for AI implementation and measurable business outcomes. Dedicated units are being established to drive this technological transition.

title: Who killed Swedish Prime Minister Olof Palme? Amateur sleuths ask AI for help
description: STOCKHOLM, Feb 28 - Forty years after Prime Minister Olof Palme was shot dead on a Stockholm street, Swedes are still wondering whether the murder was the work of a lone gunman or a political assassination.

title: 'Left wing, woke company': Trump orders government to stop using Anthropic amid battle over AI use
description: Calling Anthropic a "radical left" and "woke company", Trump said that he has directed federal agencies, including the Defense Department, to phase out their technology in six months

title: Horoscope, reimagined: AI to read your stars
description: Startups such as Melooha, AstroSage AI, Vaya, AstroSure AI, and HiAstro are reshaping the ancient practice of astrology with AI.

title: Software debt slump: AI disruption concerns trigger credit market selloff
description: The US leveraged loan market suffered a significant blow in February, marking its steepest monthly decline in more than three years. According to the Bloomberg US Leveraged Loan Index, average prices fell 1.34% throughout the month. This represents the most volatile period for the asset class since September 2022, when aggressive interest rate hikes first sparked fears of a recession.
